name: @mindmorass/mcp-phantom-brain
description: MCP phantom brain — unified memory, reasoning, and validation server

scripts.copy-seed: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src='src/seed',dst='dist/seed';function walk(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const sp=path.join(s,e.name),dp=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(sp,dp);else fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp);}}walk(src,dst);console.log('Copied seed files to dist/seed');"
